name: Beef and Green Bean Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 pound green beans, trimmed and left whole
14 ounces flank steak, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beans in a large pot of boiling water until tender, about 6 minutes; drain.
2. Stir fry beef, ginger and garlic in hot oil in a skillet for 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Whisk broth, peanut butter, vinegar, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
4. Add the mixture to the beef; cook until it boils and thickens slightly.
5. Add beans; heat through.
6. Transfer to a platter; sprinkle with peanuts. Serve.
